nasb.text: (for you know how we lived in the land of Egypt, and how we came through the midst of the nations through which you passed;

esv.text: “You know how we lived in the land of Egypt, and how we came through the midst of the nations through which you passed.

cnv.text: 你們清楚知道我們怎樣在埃及地住過，怎樣從列國中經過；

ccb.text: “你们知道我们如何在埃及生活，也知道我们如何穿越列国来到这里。
